message:
test(wave-65): trait coverage for circuit_breaker, retry, rate_limit, kafka

State/Permit Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq/Default, CircuitBreakerMetrics Debug/
Clone/Default, RetryPolicy/RetryState Debug/Clone, AlwaysRetry/NeverRetry
Debug/Clone/Copy/Default, WaitStrategy/RateLimitAlgorithm Debug/Clone/
Default, RateLimitMetrics Debug/Clone/Default, RateLimitError Debug/
Clone/Eq, Compression/Acks Debug/Clone/Copy/Default/Eq.
